qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Roles.ROL.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT EDD05_ROLES.oi_rol as ID, EDD05_ROLES.c_rol as COD, EDD05_ROLES.d_rol as DES, EDD05_ROLES.c_rol as c_rol, EDD05_ROLES.d_rol as d_rol FROM EDD05_ROLES WHERE EDD05_ROLES.oi_rol in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW
